zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短期弱势整理，压力偏上行
zh.content:
目前XRP/USD价格维持在1.13779附近，短线波动幅度有限，呈现弱势整理格局。日内最高1.13804、最低1.13515，显示多空力量暂时均衡，但整体仍低于20日均线1.15022，趋势偏向承压，短线反弹有限。

MACD指标显示负值-0.0061，暗示下行动能略占优势，但由于信号线未提供，需关注后续交叉情况。缺乏RSI参考，暂无法判断超买或超卖，但价格低于SMA20，短期偏向技术性修正。若MACD持续走低，可能延续盘整或微跌格局。

关键支撑位在1.13500附近，若守住此水平，可期待震荡回升；阻力位在1.15020附近，为20日均线位置，多头需突破此位才能重启上行趋势。中线投资者可关注支撑有效性和价格企稳信号。

交易建议上，短线以低吸高抛为主，避免追涨操作。若价格跌破1.13500支撑，可考虑减仓或等待确认反弹；若价格重返1.14500上方并伴随量能放大，可适度增持，但需严格设置止损，控制风险。整体短期偏整理，操作应以稳健为主。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is trading at 1.13779, posting only a modest 0.16% daily gain while remaining below its 20-period moving average at 1.15022. This positioning suggests that the broader short-term trend remains mildly bearish despite the recent stabilization. Price action has been confined to a narrow intraday range between 1.13515 and 1.13804, indicating a lack of strong directional conviction and a market that is currently consolidating after prior weakness.

The moving average structure remains an important signal. Trading below the SMA(20) indicates sellers still retain a degree of control over the short-term trend. Meanwhile, the MACD reading of -0.00609 remains in negative territory, reflecting lingering downside momentum. Although the absence of the signal line limits a full crossover assessment, the negative MACD value suggests bullish momentum has not yet fully developed. Traders should watch for a move back above the SMA(20) as an early indication that market sentiment is improving.

From a technical perspective, immediate support can be identified near 1.1350, which aligns closely with the session low. A break below this level could expose XRP to additional selling pressure toward the 1.1250–1.1280 region. On the upside, resistance is located near 1.1500–1.1520, where the SMA(20) currently sits. A decisive breakout above that zone would strengthen the case for a recovery toward 1.1700 and potentially higher levels if buying volume expands.

For traders, patience may be warranted until a clearer directional signal emerges. Conservative participants may prefer to wait for confirmation above 1.1500 before considering bullish positions, while short-term traders could monitor support around 1.1350 for potential rebound opportunities. Risk management remains essential, as the current narrow trading range suggests that a volatility expansion could occur once XRP breaks out of its consolidation phase.
